post.content:
Hi LeetCoders,

Have any of you been through a recent machine coding round? I'd love to hear about your experience! Whether it's insights, details, or tips, I'm all ears.
Also, my machine coding round is scehduled for 75 minutes, so I'm curious if I'll have to code infront of the interviewer itself or will they drop from the call and then rejoin again.

Would highly appreciate if anyone could suggest good resources.

Thanks in advance!
Can you share your qsn for practice?

In most companies, a machine coding round is scheduled for many candidates, and the interviewer explains the requirements to all the candidates. During coding, you must join the video call provided to each candidate separately with your camera open(nobody else will be there) and submit the code in zip format. I hope it helps.
is this a round after the Uber OA occurred on 9 may?
